skills.label: Read Pitch Notation
skills.description: Identify pitches, clefs, and key signatures accurately.

skills.label: Parse Meter and Rhythm
skills.description: Interpret meters and notate rhythmic patterns.

skills.label: Analyze Melodic Shape
skills.description: Describe contour, motives, and minor-key melody.

skills.label: Spell Chords
skills.description: Build triads and seventh chords in root and inversion.

skills.label: Label Texture
skills.description: Classify monophony, homophony, polyphony, and related textures.

skills.label: Apply Voice Leading
skills.description: Write SATB connections respecting common-practice norms.

skills.label: Identify Cadences
skills.description: Recognize authentic, plagal, half, and deceptive cadences.

skills.label: Analyze Progressions
skills.description: Explain functional chord progressions and sequences.

skills.label: Map Phrase Models
skills.description: Relate harmony to phrase and period structure.

skills.label: Label Nonchord Tones
skills.description: Identify passing, neighbor, suspension, and related tones.

skills.label: Realize Figured Bass
skills.description: Interpret figures and produce correct sonorities.

skills.label: Use Secondary Dominants
skills.description: Tonicize chords with V/x and related functions.

skills.label: Track Modulation
skills.description: Explain tonicization vs longer key change.

skills.label: Map Musical Form
skills.description: Identify phrase, binary/ternary, and larger formal units.

skills.label: Sight-Sing Prepared Lines
skills.description: Perform pitch and rhythm accurately from notation.
